jobs.title: Assistant Girls Volleyball Coach (no teaching assignment)
jobs.description: This Assistant Girls Volleyball coaching assignment is for the 2026-2027 school year with no expectation of a teaching assignment.WCSD coaches are required to meet all UHSAA certification requirementspriorto starting assignment and are required to maintain certifications during duration of employment.If any additional questions, applicants can contact the Athletic Director, Randy Wyatt, at randy.wyatt@washk12.org.A stipend will be provided for this assignment.

jobs.title: Head Girls Wrestling Coach (no teaching assignment)
jobs.description: This Head Coach Girls Wrestling assignment is for the 2026-2027 school year with no expectation of a teaching assignment.WCSD coaches are required to meet all UHSAA certification requirementspriorto starting assignment and are required to maintain certifications during duration of employment.If any additional questions, applicants can contact the Athletic Director, Ryan Christiansen,  at ryan.christiansen@washk12.org.A stipend will be provided for this assignment.

jobs.title: Registered Behavior Technician
jobs.status: Part Time, 27.5 hours per weekMinimum Requirements:EDUCATION and/or EXPERIENCEAssociate's degreeor48 semester hours from an accredited college/universityorpassing results on an approved Paraprofessional Assessment.Consideration will be given to individuals with equivalent work experience specific to working with students with emotional/behavioral disabilities.CERTIFICATES, LICENSES, REGISTRATIONSMust have a Registered Behavior Technician (RBT) Certification issued by the Behavior Analyst Certification Board (BACB).Will be required to complete the following training within 12 months of contract start date:WCSD Intensive Behavior Intervention (IBI) Training Level IWCSD Intensive Behavior Intervention (IBI) Training Level IIThe salary for this position is $28.87 per hour.Attachment(s):Registered Behavior Technician.pdfEmail To A FriendPrint Version

jobs.status: Full Time, 1.1429 FTEIncludes extra period.Minimum Requirements:An Active Utah Secondary Education Teaching License with Middle School Math endorsement.The salary for this position is assigned to the TT Salary Schedule.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkTT Salary Schedule.For new hires & rehires, WCSD will recognize no more than thirteen full time, complete years of previous teaching experience when placing on the TT Salary Schedule. jobs.title: Substitute Bus Attendant
jobs.status: On-Call/As Needed BasisMinimum Requirements:High school diploma or general education degree (GED); or six months to one year related experience and/or training; or equivalent combination of education and experience.Ability to work effectively with individuals with disabilities.  Ability to learn tasks quickly and work with minimum supervision.  Ability to learn and implement emergency procedures associated with bus.  Previous experience working with individuals with disabilities preferred.The salary for this position is assigned to Lane 2 of the SC Salary Schedule.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkSC Salary Schedule.Attachment(s):Bus Attendant.pdfEmail To A FriendPrint Version

jobs.title: Substitute Bus Driver Trainee
jobs.status: Part Time, On-Call/As NeededMinimum QualificationsMinimum age of 21 years.Have no more than 100 points recorded on past driving record.  No more than two at-fault accidents, two citations, or a combination of one at-fault accident and one citation, in a 24 month period.Hold and maintain a Utah Commercial Drivers License.  Driver Training will be provided if candidate needs to obtain the Utah Commercial Drivers License.The salary for this position is assigned to the BD Salary Schedule AFTER completion of training.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkBD Salary Schedule.APPLICANTS ARE REQUIRED TO ATTACH/UPLOAD A COPY OF THEIR CURRENT DRIVING RECORD WITH THE APPLICATIONA copy of the driving record can be obtained from the Department of Motor Vehicles.Attachment(s):Bus Driver & Sub Bus Driver.pdfEmail To A FriendPrint Version
